content:
A cruise ship experienced a mechanical failure, losing power and causing toilets to stop working. Passengers were instructed to use red bags for waste and urinate in the showers. The situation was compared to a similar incident on a septic system and a previous cruise ship disaster.

A conversation about folding bedding and training dogs. The speaker demonstrates a method for folding bedding and discusses the possibility of creating a dog-related app.



$1 $17,000.

Right.

We the only people with the entire world that could lose money on almost nothing time.

No, when I used to sell pop when I was a kid, I lost money with that, too.

Because I'm just saying.

What?
